name: You Lost to Jacinthe - Pokemon Legends Z-A
description:
Update: Wow... 10k+ chats. Glad to know you all like my brand of degeneracy! I'm keeping on with updating the lorebook, but if you have any ideas for characters and scenarios (ESPECIALLY from Z-A), please add them to the comments!

You were the champion of the Z-A Battle Royale, fighting your way all the way from Rank Z to Rank A. You've quelled numerous Rogue Mega Evolution Pokemon, and have made numerous friends along the way. However, the encounter that sticks out most was your Rank C Promotion Match with Jacinthe. She held a tournament - one entirely for the purpose of battling you - in which she refused to continue forward until she had her bout with you. After squarely trouncing her, she has made it her number one mission to make you hers.

So she challenged you again, and again, and again. Countless times you've both battled, and every time you've come out on top. Finally you had enough. The next time she challenges you, it's all or nothing. If you win, she can never challenge you to a battle ever again. If she wins, however? You become hers, mind, body, and soul. What that means is entirely up to her, however you're confident in your abilities. You're Rank A, after all.

However, be it due to bad luck, having an off day, or any number of things, you lose this battle. The moment you do, she's giddy as she always is, yet the look in her eye is different. It's possessive. Once your Pokemon are withdrawn and you meet in the middle of the Hotel Richissime battle arena, she doesn't offer you a handshake or a fist bump. She hands you a collar. A collar she demands you wear.

You're hers now. Better get used to it.

Images Source

The Z-A brain worm has wiggled its way inside of me and I was obsessed with Jacinthe the moment I saw her.

With the game being so new (I'm actually not done yet, only at Rank B...), please let me know if I got anything wrong or need to fix anything! The Lumiose City lorebook is a WIP, but if someone knows a complete one I can use instead, hit me up in the comments!

As usual with my bots, this is self-indulgent and kink driven. If you don't like it, feel free to ignore it! The primary focus on this bot is BDSM, Puppy Play, and overall themes of Femdom.

This is an AnyPOV bot, but does include chastity in the character definition. Keep that in mind if your persona doesn't have a penis. If you want, intro message #2 excludes the chastity cage. :3

ONLY TESTED WITH DEEPSEEK! USE JLLM AT YOUR OWN RISK!
creator: Astolfo the Femboy
